assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed; the swizzle feature rides on GPUTextureView creation.
navigator.gpu.requestAdapter is callable — the surface to inspect texture-component-swizzle feature support.
GPUDevice.createTexture remains the surface that produces the texture which a swizzled view is built from.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();return typeof d.createTexture==='function';})()

assertions.description: GPUTexture.createView accepts a descriptor object — the swizzle members are added to this dict.
assertions.test: (async()=>{if(!navigator.gpu)return false;const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return false;const d=await a.requestDevice();const t=d.createTexture({size:[1,1,1],format:'rgba8unorm',usage:GPUTextureUsage.TEXTURE_BINDING});const v=t.createView({});return !!v;})()

assertions.description: requestDevice with requiredFeatures=['texture-component-swizzle'] rejects if the adapter does not list it.
